description_long: This is a long, slender screwdriver with a cylindrical shaft and a straight, ribbed handle. The handle appears to be made of black plastic or rubber, featuring a textured grip for improved ergonomics and slip resistance. The shaft is metallic with a copper or bronze finish, extending from the handle to the tip. The tip is narrow and appears to be a flathead design, suitable for slotted screws. The overall construction suggests durability and utility for various urban repair or maintenance tasks. No visible branding or markings are present, and the object appears to be in pristine condition with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A long, slender screwdriver with a ribbed black handle and a copper-colored shaft, featuring a flathead tip. The handle is textured for grip and the object appears new and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the screwdriver, highlighting the ribbed handle and copper shaft.
description_view_1: Side view with similar features as the front, showing the straight alignment of the shaft and handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the ribbed handle and copper shaft visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the straight shaft and ribbed handle, with no additional features.
attribute_handle_type: straight, ribbed, black, plastic or rubberized, textured for grip
